steps.title: Identify the passage's concluding emphasis
steps.content: The passage's final point is explicit: of the three films for which Carlos is credited, Tron is the one in which audiences can hear the most of her original compositions. This is what the passage builds toward.

steps.title: Match the main point to the choices
steps.content: Choice A states exactly this: Tron features the most original music from Carlos among the three films. The other choices either reverse the passage's facts (B), introduce unsupported claims (C), or emphasize peripheral details over the passage's central comparison (D). That matches choice A — A is correct.
